title: tapiphyllum cinerascens subsp. laevius
intro: Tapiphyllum cinerascens subsp. laevius, also known as the 'Chinese Silver Vine', is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to stimulate the nervous system and relieve anxiety. The plant's health benefits include its potential to reduce symptoms of ADHD, promote relaxation, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to harness its therapeutic effects.
